description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. As an added bonus, restaurant is provided on-site to conveniently serve your needs.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: will come back

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Rooms was quite ok but soooo upset when we were give a room on level 3 which there was a renovation of all the rooms infront of our room. The sound of knocking and dust along the pathway disturbed our day nap after a hectic day in Pulau Weh. I tried asking the staff to have change room to other level but they said all standard room were fully book. Overheard there were deluxe rooms available but they refused to offer me and change our room to the same floor a bit further up thinking the renovation sounds were less heard!
One thing else there is no mini bar in the room.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I loved the breakfast meal. Hotel is a bit far from city center. Super friendly staff.  Old building,rooms are not well kept and has a mouldy smell.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Pros: Very spacious room.  Convenient hotel. Consider close to airport. Breakfast got variaties of local food.
Cons: Low water pressure. A bit far from city centre (Banda Aceh).

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Provided free transportation from port.
Transportation to airport need to pay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: very helpful staff who go above and beyond to make your stay as pleasant as possible , great for a stay over , no English channels on the tvs but if you there for the an over nighter , that's no biggie - free wifi for YouTube n such .

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room has a horrible smell that came from the bathroom, we think is caused by a poorly built toilet system. There were ants in the room. No extra power point to charge electronic devices. Of the 3 rooms we had, only one room was the tv operational. Air-con was not good enough to cool the room. One room, the air-con was not working. Would not recommend anyone to this hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
When i booked via Agoda, they refer me to the old hotel, but when i check in, they said my room was in the new hotel. The good things is they have car to dilver us to another building.

The room is new and clean, unless the toilet, which is smells bad. I told to the manager, and he sent a room service to clean. But it still smells bad. But because i only stay for a night, and it was too late to change place, so i ignore it.
comments.reviewTitle: 2 types hotel with the same name

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Ok

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Before we arrived the staff was very helpfull, the Hotel offered a free pick up Service from the Harbor which was great. 
Unfortunately after we checked in the comfort, cleanliness and the Services weren´t pretty good any more. The staff hardly speaks any english, the room was very basic and the cleanliness was also very basic

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The management of this hotel bent over backwards to try to please us.  The rooms were very large (28 sq. m.) and there was very comfortable, and functional furniture.  The room had two smallish windows and the hotel was very quiet.  The bathroom was good sized and had lots of hot water and a good shower. The hotel was not beautiful.  It was a bit tired looking and the room was a bit dingy, but very clean.  Having white, florescent lights did not help the ambiance, but the room had two wall lights which were yellow colored (natural daylight type) lights.  We enjoyed the space and the desks and closets.  This hotel is the closest to the airport and still less than half an hour from the center of the city.
comments.reviewPositives: Large rooms, lots of hot water, good AC

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This was a good, standard hotel, but the cleanliness and maintenance of the facilities was a little lacking. The bathroom in particular could have used a better cleaning: the toilet did not flush, but the shower and sink worked well with hot (sqaulding hot actually) water. The AC in the room worked well, and the staff were friendly, although check-in took a while. The arranged  a taxi to the airport and provided a wake-up call as requested. This is a descent, no-extras place to stay.
comments.reviewPositives: Good location close to airport, quiet, secure
comments.reviewTitle: Over night on way to airport

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: le personnel était très agréable et serviable. Ils ont rendu notre séjour agréable. La chambre était grande et confortable. Seul la salle de bain laissait un peu à désirer au point de vu entretien et on n'a pas réussi à avoir de l'eau chaude,mais pour le prix............
comments.reviewTitle: Un staff très gentil et serviable

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Waren auf der Durchreise nach Sabang. Dafür hat das Zimmer getaugt...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Wir wurden freundlich empfangen. Das Verständigen fällt nicht sehr leicht, da die Mitarbeiter (Manager ausgeschlossen) nur begrenzt Englisch sprechen. Die Verständigung klappte dennoch sehr gut, wenn auch mit Händen, Füssen und Zeichnungen. Alle geben sich äusserst viel Mühe, damit der Aufenthalt möglichst angenehm ist. Preis-Leistung ist sehr sehr gut.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Das Permata Hati ist schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen und es gibt einen deutlichen Reparaturstau. Die Sanitärarmaturen waren zum Teil defekt (abgebrochener Wasserhahn etc.), auch die Zimmer und Türen könnten einen neuen Anstrich vertragen. Das Personal ist freundlich und bemüht, die Verständigung ist wegen der dürftigen Englischkenntnisse schwierig. Das Zimmer war sehr laut (man konnte jedes Wort, das an der Rezeption gesprochen wurde hören). Ein Mittag- oder Abendessen war nicht zu bekommen, wegen unserer frühen Abreise bekamen wir wenigstens in paar Cornflakes. Das Hotel liegt günstig zum Flughafen aber schlecht, um die Innenstadt zu erreichen.
Für die örtlichen Verhältnisse etwas zu teuer, aber wer für eine Nacht eine Transferbleibe braucht, ausreichend!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: keadaan bilik cantik kerana baru di ubahsuai, cuma tekanan air yang rendah di untuk shower agak kurang memuaskan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Waktu yang sangat singkat hanya cukup melepas lelah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Setelah menginap beberapa malam di hotel lain dengan rasa yang kurang nyaman, teman menyarankan untuk coba menginap di hotel ini. Saat check in, agak lama juga karena kesannya hotelnya penuh karena ada acara lokakarya. setelah agak lama menunggu, akhirnya petugas hotel mengabari saya kalau kamarnya sudah ada. Saat masuk ke kamar, ruang tidurnya cukup luas, bed nya juga bagus dan empuk, ac dingin. Tapi sayang exhaust fan di kamar mandinya rusak/tidak ada, sehingga udara kamarnya kurang segar. Tapi pelayanan hotel cukup menyenangkan
comments.reviewPositives: Kamarnya luas, nyaman, stafnya baik dan ramah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 不錯
